Event: Experimental Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 05/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: SL55
Boiler House Flame Dagger's Soul

Once in a while, the unit throws daggers at 3 random enemy units. When the daggers hit, they deal physical damage to the targets, equal to 35% of the targets' maximum health, and cover them in jelly for 4 sec. For 4 sec., the targets are unable to attack or move, and take 45% more damage. When the ability wears off, the jelly explodes and sticks to 2 nearest enemy units for 3 sec. Their attack speed is reduced by 50%, and they have a 50% chance to miss their target on attack.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
